section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports swelling in her feet.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a patient-reported symptom and belongs in the history rather than the objective findings/exam section.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient denies any other significant findings.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a subjective global denial statement rather than an objective exam or test result; it more appropriately fits in the history, but its placement does not substantially distort clinical meaning.
